response.justification: While the candidate brings strong general software engineering credentials with 15+ years of diverse experience and solid practices (TDD, CI/CD), he fails on critical requirements. Most critically, native-level Japanese proficiency is explicitly required and not listed among his languages (English fluent, Romanian fluent, German basic). Additionally, his career has been predominantly web and backend-focused (Node.js, TypeScript, cloud platforms), with minimal embedded systems work, no demonstrated security technology expertise (encryption, authentication systems, MACsec), and only 4 months of C/C++ experience a decade ago. The role requires deep embedded networking and security domain knowledge that isn't present in his background.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (15+ years) across multiple domains demonstrating adaptability and learning capacity
Proven expertise in software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and code quality principles
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring capabilities through workshops, open-source contributions, and team guidance
concerns: Missing critical requirement: no native-level Japanese proficiency listed (role explicitly requires this)
Career trajectory is web/backend-focused with minimal embedded systems experience; last C/C++ work was 10+ years ago at National Instruments

No demonstrated expertise in required security technologies (encryption, MACsec, 802.1X, authentication systems, device attack detection) or networking domains (Layer-2/3, switch operations, SNMP, NETCONF)

key_factors.factor: Minimal embedded systems and security networking experience
